quote: Now, because of CineLibrary, I watch more movies. I'd collected films and had no idea I already owned them — the movie cards and details are so helpful.

I've used this since version 1. So many updates along the way, but nothing ever broke, and there's an exciting feature in every new version. It feels mature now — please keep this UI as it is, it's user-friendly.

Honestly, I never expected free software that asks practically nothing in return to be this feature-rich — everything a movie lover expects. I'd love to support the developer; please add a payment method that suits you.
Just keep it up — you're doing awesome work. Kudos!

A friend recommended it. I added my movies folder but nothing showed up and I got confused — then I read the user guide. The companion app, CineLibrary Essentials, is so smart it sorted everything in no time, and now my library has over 6,000 movies. New users: get CineLibrary Essentials first and tidy your movies folder before adding it to CineLibrary.
